headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 18, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays secured a thrilling 3-6 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Drew Rasmussen earning the win. Junior Caminero led the Marlins' offense with a home run and 2 RBIs. In other action, the Baltimore Orioles took down the Washington Nationals 7-3, with Gunnar Henderson leading the charge at the plate. The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates 6-0, with Zack Wheeler pitching 7.0 innings with 8 strikeouts and no earned runs. The Atlanta Braves routed the Boston Red Sox 8-1, with Grant Holmes leading the Braves' pitching effort.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, affecting their teams' lineups. Seattle Mariners third baseman Brendan Donovan has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left groin muscle strain, effective retroactive to May 16, 2026. Los Angeles Dodgers left-hander Jack Dreyer has been placed on the 15-day injured list with left shoulder discomfort. Other teams have also suffered injuries, including the Chicago Cubs, Detroit Tigers, Pittsburgh Pirates, Cincinnati Reds, Toronto Blue Jays, and Tampa Bay Rays.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place. Eric Lauer has been traded to the Los Angeles Dodgers, marking a move for the left-handed pitcher. The trade was reportedly made for cash. Other trades include the Chicago White Sox acquiring Junior Perez from the Athletics, the Athletics trading Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for Alika Williams, and the Athletics trading Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Marlins in 3-6 Thriller**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 3-6 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Drew Rasmussen earning the win. Junior Caminero led the Marlins' offense with a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Nationals 7-3**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 7-3 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Gunnar Henderson leading the charge at the plate. Henderson's impressive performance included four hits, one home run, and two RBIs, while Anthony Nunez earned the win with 1.1 scoreless innings of relief.

top_news.title: **Phillies Shut Out Pirates 6-0**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates, securing a 6-0 victory. Zack Wheeler led the way on the mound, pitching 7.0 innings with 8 strikeouts and no earned runs.

top_news.title: **Braves Rout Red Sox 8-1**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves dominated the Boston Red Sox, securing an 8-1 victory. Grant Holmes led the Braves' pitching effort, throwing 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Mariners Place Donovan on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners third baseman Brendan Donovan has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left groin muscle strain, effective retroactive to May 16, 2026.

top_news.title: **Lauer Joins Dodgers in Trade**
top_news.summary: Eric Lauer has been traded to the Los Angeles Dodgers, marking a move for the left-handed pitcher. The trade was reportedly made for cash.
